text: Thread: approach to the resident who cannot sleep post-call. 1/ Protect the golden hours.
Cardiac sarcoid is the great mimic. If the EKG is weird and the patient is young, keep it on the list.
Representation in medicine matters. Proud of our trainees presenting at conference this fall.
Reminder: your wellness check-ins are not optional. Book them like a clinic slot.
Follow-up to the sarcoid thread: FDG-PET prep matters. Low-carb high-fat diet the day before.
Sloan's Lake loop is prime this week. Cool mornings, no ice yet.
New issue TOC is live. Several biofortification and health-disparities papers this cycle.
Case report tip: lead with why the presentation was atypical, not the diagnosis itself.
